meta.description: On-demand 12-month security-awareness CAMPAIGN CALENDAR. Trigger via Telegram (/calendar [year]) or manually (form: year, focus/region, audience). AI plans monthly themes, focus, channels, key dates and activity ideas; Render builds a calendar/table PDF AND an .ics feed (one all-day event per month) written to /reports/awareness/calendar. The PDF is returned in chat.

parameters.formDescription: Choose a year and optional focus, then submit. Produces a 12-month plan (PDF) and a calendar feed (.ics).

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.5, "num_predict": 3500 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are a security-awareness programme manager. Design a 12-month awareness campaign calendar for the given year and audience. Produce a SINGLE valid JSON object. Keys: year; months (EXACTLY 12 items in calendar order, each {month (full month name), theme (short campaign theme, max 5 words), focus (one sentence on the behaviour/risk targeted), channels (array of 2-4 short delivery channels e.g. poster, email, e-learning, tabletop), keyDates (array of 1-3 short strings; tie to relevant awareness events/observances where sensible), ideas (array of 2-3 short activity ideas)}); takeaways (3-4 short 'lessons learned' one-liners summarising the campaign priorities for the year). Vary the themes across the year to cover the major human-risk areas (phishing, passwords/MFA, social engineering, data handling, remote/travel, ransomware, insider risk, secure AI use, incident reporting). Plain, practical language. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify('Design a 12-month security-awareness campaign calendar for the year ' + ($json.year||'') + '. Audience: ' + ($json.audience||'All staff') + ($json.focus?('. Focus/region: '+$json.focus):'') + '.') }} } ]
}
